name: Chutes
description: Registers Chutes as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider with upstream shared-endpoint model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Chutes API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Chutes API key
settings.description: Chutes API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to CHUTES_API_KEY.

providers.name: Chutes
providers.description: Refreshes Chutes shared OpenAI-compatible chat models from the upstream /v1/models catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
